title: PlasmaZones Layout
description: A tiling layout with identity metadata and a list of zones with relative geometry. Structural invariants are enforced here. The optional appearance, shader, gap, geometry-mode, and visibility keys are allowed through so editor-produced and future layouts are not rejected.

id.description: Stable layout identity. Built-in layouts use a brace-wrapped UUID.

name.description: Display name. The loader rejects layouts with an empty name.

aspectRatioClass.description: Aspect-ratio bucket the layout targets. Both serialized forms are on the wire and readers accept either: Layout::toJson emits the canonical string, while the editor's save round-trip carries the raw enum int. Omitting the key means Any.

zones.description: At least one zone. The loader rejects zero-zone layouts.

relativeGeometry.description: Screen-relative rectangle in the range 0.0-1.0. Width and height must be positive.
